title: Verilator bug with shift, expression width and signedness

features.name: left shift with negative signed literal shift amount
features.description: Code should include a left shift operation using a negative signed literal as the shift amount, where the literal uses explicit size and signed designation

features.name: signed input to shift operation with unsigned result
features.description: Code should include a signed input value being shifted with the result assigned to an unsigned wider output, testing correct sign handling in shift operations
